items.definition_en: An artichoke is a green vegetable with thick leaves and a soft heart.
items.example_en: I like to add artichoke to my salads for extra flavor.

items.definition_en: Asparagus is a long green vegetable often served steamed or roasted.
items.example_en: She prepared grilled asparagus for dinner last night.

items.definition_en: A brussels sprout is a small green vegetable that looks like a tiny cabbage.
items.example_en: Brussels sprouts taste delicious when roasted with garlic.

items.definition_en: Celeriac is a root vegetable with a mild, celery-like flavor.
items.example_en: Celeriac can be mashed as an alternative to potatoes.

items.definition_en: Kohlrabi is a bulbous vegetable with a crisp texture and mild taste.
items.example_en: She added shredded kohlrabi to the salad.

items.definition_en: A turnip is a round root vegetable with white and purple skin.
items.example_en: Turnip can be added to soups and stews.

items.definition_en: A broad bean is a large flat bean found in a green pod.
items.example_en: Broad beans are delicious when served with mint.

items.definition_en: Endive is a leafy vegetable with a slightly bitter taste.
items.example_en: He added fresh endive to the mixed salad.
